data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Damage/cleaning bond', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions a '$500 damage deposit held', it does not provide concrete evidence of how this bond is managed or enforced within the system. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the bond requirement is implemented in the API or system behavior.
gaps: No explicit confirmation of how the damage/cleaning bond is enforced or managed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the management of the damage/cleaning bond.
